overview.description: The Leverage Shares 2X Long DUOL Daily ETF (DUOG) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in consumer discretionary equity. The fund aims to provide 2x leveraged exposure to the daily price movement of Duolingo, Inc.(Nasdaq: DUOL) stock, less fees, and expenses. DUOL is known for its gamified language-learning platform used by millions worldwide. DUOG was launched on Dec 11, 2025 and is issued by Leverage Shares.
